home.title: Fletix
home.welcome_subtitle: Manage zones, rates, and the carrier service for checkout in one place.
home.plan_free_sub: Upgrade for more zones and rules
home.setup_desc: Complete these steps for the carrier service to work correctly.
home.step_zones_desc: Create zones by department with service rates.
home.step_default_desc: Configure a fallback rate for departments without a zone.
home.step_carrier_desc: Register the carrier service from the Shipping Rules screen.
home.no_rates_warning: No rates configured. Create zones and rates in Shipping Rules.
home.how_step1_desc: Create rates by department, city, schedule and delivery method.
home.how_step2_desc: Shopify calls this endpoint at checkout to get available rates.
home.how_step3_desc: The customer sees only the rate matching their selected method and location.

shipping.title: Shipping rules by city
shipping.subtitle: Configure rates with municipality restrictions. These rules apply at checkout (carrier service).
shipping.default_desc: This rate applies when the destination does not have a specific zone configured. It is the fallback for departments without their own rules.
shipping.default_warning: No default rate configured. Departments without a specific zone will have no shipping options at checkout.
shipping.no_rates_zone: No rates configured for this zone.
shipping.name: Name
shipping.schedule_hint: Leave empty for available all day.
shipping.days_hint: If none selected, applies every day.
shipping.zone_names_desc: In Shopify Admin → Shipping and delivery → Shipping profile, the name of each zone determines what shipping type it generates:
shipping.zone_express: Name contains "express" → classified as express shipping
shipping.zone_envio: Name contains "envio" or "casa" (without "express") → classified as standard shipping
shipping.zone_caution: "Envio Express" counts as express, not standard. If a warehouse needs both services, create two separate zones: one "Express" and one "Envio a Casa".
shipping.sync_desc: Publish rules so badges and the delivery method selector on the storefront filter by municipality.
shipping.carrier_desc: Register the rates service so rules also apply at checkout. You only need to do this once.
shipping.csv_desc: Bulk upload of zones and rates. Zones are created automatically. Format: department, rate_name, service_type, price, city_condition, cities, description, from_time, to_time, days
shipping.csv_pro_only: CSV import and export are included in the Pro plan.
shipping.rate_locked_pro: This rate uses Pro-only options (weight/cart tiers, schedule, or product tags). Upgrade or delete it and create a flat-rate rule.
shipping.limit_rates_per_zone_ui: You've reached your plan's maximum rates per zone.
shipping.limit_zones_ui: You've reached your plan's maximum number of zones.
shipping.exclude_tags: All products except with these tags

csv.min_rows: CSV must have at least a header and one data row
csv.missing_fields: Row {{n}}: missing fields (minimum: department, name, service_type, price)
csv.invalid_service: Row {{n}}: service type "{{code}}" is not valid (use: Standard shipping, Express shipping, Store pickup)

billing.title: Plans & Pricing
billing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your business.
billing.free_desc: Ideal for stores getting started with basic shipping rules.
billing.pro_desc: For stores that need full control over rates and coverage.
billing.limit_zones: You've reached the {{max}} zones limit on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro to add more.
billing.limit_rates: You've reached the {{max}} rates per zone limit on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro to add more.
billing.limit_feature: This feature is available on the Pro plan.
billing.sponsored_cannot_downgrade: This Pro access is assigned by the Fletix team. Contact support to change plans.
